chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – The utilization of the world upon (attaining) the Hereafter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/15)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/15)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) غِنًى يَحْجُزُكَ عَنِ الظُّلْمِ خَيْرٌ مِنْ فَقْرٍ يَحْمِلُكَ عَلَى الْإِثْمِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Prosperity which withholds you from the injustice is better than poverty carrying you upon the sins’.
en.sarwar: 11. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Khalid in a marfu’ manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once said, ‘A wealth that keeps you away from injustice is better than poverty which leads you to commit sins.’”
